result: Data cleaning completed successfully. The R script loaded 6 survey datasets (waves 1, 4, 6, 7, 8, and 9) from data/input/, merged them by NSID using full_join, and created harmonized sexual orientation variables (sori19, sori20, sori25, sori32) with standardized missing value codes. The cleaned dataset contains 16,111 rows and 5 columns (NSID + 4 derived sexual orientation variables) and has been saved to data/output/cleaned_data.csv. All missing value codes were harmonized to the standard scheme (-9=Refusal, -8=Don't know, -7=Prefer not to say, -3=Not asked, -1=Not applicable), and variables were converted to factors with explicit labels.
